title: Predictive Maintenance System for Aircraft Components
shortDescription: Machine learning system predicting aircraft component failures up to 30 days in advance.
description: Developed a predictive maintenance system using industrial time-series data from multiple aircraft systems. Built and trained models (Logistic Regression, XGBoost) to detect failure patterns. Designed an interactive dashboard to visualize risk scores and support maintenance decision-making.

title: Private Cloud Infrastructure using OpenStack
shortDescription: Designed and deployed a scalable private cloud platform for enterprise use.
description: Built a private cloud infrastructure using OpenStack, configuring Nova, Neutron, and Cinder services. Designed a high-availability architecture with redundancy and scalability, and performed performance validation for enterprise-level deployment.

title: Supply Chain & Inventory Optimization
shortDescription: Optimized inventory and production workflows through data-driven analysis.
description: Analyzed supply chain operations for raw materials and finished goods. Identified inefficiencies in stock management and proposed improvements for tracking and planning, contributing to better production and logistics performance.

title: Telecom Network & Infrastructure Analysis
shortDescription: Analysis of telecom network architecture and transmission systems.
description: Studied mobile network architecture (2G/3G/4G), fiber infrastructure, and DWDM transmission systems. Analyzed protocols and contributed to network optimization and virtualization strategies (NFV).
